items.content_statement: Recognize a range of emotions that impact self and others
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for emotional recognition - Type 2

items.content_statement: Describe how emotions impact their thoughts, behaviors, and relationships
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability requiring reasoning about causal connections - Type 2

items.content_statement: Identify how interests, strengths, and values influence their academic and social opportunities
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability requiring reasoning about connections between personal attributes and opportunities - Type 2

items.content_statement: Identify and utilize strategies for persevering through challenges and setbacks
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when challenges arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Use optimism and a growth mindset to recognize strengths and identify skills they want to develop
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when reflecting on development - Type 2

items.content_statement: Recognize that how they choose to express emotions can have positive and negative consequences for myself and others
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about cause-and-effect relationships between emotional expression and consequences

items.content_statement: Practice various coping skills to process thoughts and manage stressful situations
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical capability deployed when stressful situations arise

items.content_statement: Recognize the importance of long- and short-term goals for success in school and in life
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about the relationship between goal-setting and success

items.content_statement: Plan steps to achieve their goals
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill deployed when goal achievement planning is needed

items.content_statement: Reflect on progress toward a goal and evaluate the steps needed to achieve this goal
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical capability deployed when goal evaluation is prompted

items.content_statement: Reframe a challenging situation into a positive learning opportunity for growth
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill deployed when challenging situations are encountered

items.content_statement: Respectfully ask questions to learn about the cultures, traditions, and beliefs of others
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill deployed when encountering cultural differences

items.content_statement: Identify when the viewpoints or perceptions of others might be different
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill deployed when assessing social situations

items.content_statement: Define stereotyping, discrimination, and prejudice and understand how they can be harmful
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about concepts and their effects

items.content_statement: Empathize with others' thoughts, perspectives, and emotions
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill deployed when encountering others' experiences

items.content_statement: Independently express gratitude in multiple settings
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Contribute in our school community and participate in opportunities that contribute to the well-being of self and others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Participate in positive relationships and demonstrate inclusiveness in relationship building
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - participating in positive relationships and demonstrating inclusiveness operates as an ongoing enacted capacity across contexts

items.content_statement: Perform different roles in a collaborative group and contribute to achieving personal and collective goals
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - performing different roles and contributing to goals is deployed when collaborative situations call for it

items.content_statement: Demonstrate the ability to give and receive feedback in a respectful way
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - giving and receiving feedback is deployed when feedback situations arise

items.content_statement: Demonstrate positive communication skills, including interactions on social and digital media, and reflect on the potential impact on their reputation and relationships
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - demonstrating communication skills and reflecting on impact is deployed when communication situations call for it

items.content_statement: Identify the roles of individuals in conflict and activate the steps of a conflict resolution process to manage disagreements and maintain safety and seek support when needed
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered skill - identifying roles and activating conflict resolution steps is deployed when conflict situations arise

items.content_statement: Show curiosity about a personal or social problem by asking questions and gathering information to identify potential solutions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when a problem situation calls for it - multiple valid approaches to inquiry and solution identification

items.content_statement: Utilize the steps of a decision-making model
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with defined steps that must be followed in sequence

items.content_statement: Gather evidence to support and solve academic and social challenges
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for evidence evaluation - quality of reasoning determines effectiveness across different challenge contexts

items.content_statement: Make choices about personal behaviors and social interactions and reflect on how the actions they take impact academic, physical, and/or emotional well-being
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for choice-making and reflection - multiple valid frameworks for analyzing impact across different contexts

items.content_statement: Explain how behavior and choices impact the well-being of our class, school, home, and community
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for explaining causal relationships - multiple valid explanatory frameworks across different contexts

items.content_statement: Identify the impact of decisions on relationships and academic, physical, and emotional well-being
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for impact identification - multiple valid approaches to analyzing decision consequences
